content.query:
CREATE TABLE [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_WBR]
(
	[PayrollCompanyCode] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[AssociateID] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[HomeDepartmentDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[LocationDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[SubLocation] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[SubDept] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[BusinessUnitDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[JobTitleDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[TerminationReasonDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[TerminationDate] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[HireDate] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[PositionStatus] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[Recruiter] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[FLSA_Desc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[Race_Desc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[WorkerCategoryDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[Gender] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[ReportsToName] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[ReportsToJobTitleDesc] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[ReportsToAssociateID] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[PositionID] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[Hire_Rehire_Date] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[BirthDate] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	[ReportDate] [nvarchar](1000) NULL,

	EmployeeEligibleForRehire  [nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	RehireDate					[nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	Rehire_EligibilityComments  [nvarchar](4000) NULL,
	Rehire_ReasonDescription	[nvarchar](4000) NULL,
	WorkEmail					[nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	PersonalEmail				[nvarchar](1000) NULL,
	YearsOfService				nvarchar(100)
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
